class.name: ResonancePlayer
class.brief_description: A Steam Audio source that supports physics-based occlusion, transmission, and reverb.
class.description: ResonancePlayer extends AudioStreamPlayer3D for sources that interact with Steam Audio geometry. Assign a ResonancePlayerConfig to enable occlusion, distance attenuation, air absorption, and directivity. When player_config is null, behaves as a normal AudioStreamPlayer3D (no Resonance processing).

method.name: play_stream
method.description: Starts playback with Resonance processing. Only applies when player_config is set.

members.member: ResonancePlayerConfig resource. When set, enables Steam Audio processing (occlusion, reverb, pathing, etc.). When null, acts as plain AudioStreamPlayer3D.

Pathing: Optional ResonanceProbeVolume to use for path finding. Empty = use first loaded volume with pathing. Only used when player_config is set. Note: Deleting a probe volume that is still referenced here can trigger a Godot engine error. Clear this property manually before deleting the volume if needed.
